title: Phase 4C: Order module - UI (list, detail, form, items editor, status controls, timeline, pack slip)
description: Build the complete order UI: order list page, order detail page with items/status/timeline/exceptions/attachments, create/edit order form, order items editor with readiness indicators, status controls with transition buttons, event timeline, and printable pack slip.
steps: Create src/app/(dashboard)/orders/page.tsx with order list DataTable
Implement filters: status, customer, branch, date range, delivery type, has-exceptions
Create src/app/(dashboard)/orders/[id]/page.tsx with order detail page
Include sections: header/status, items table, timeline, exceptions, attachments
Create src/components/orders/order-form.tsx with create/edit order form
Include customer selector, delivery type, delivery date, notes, PO number
Show product search, quantity, pricing, readiness indicator per item
Create src/components/orders/order-timeline.tsx with audit event timeline
Create src/components/orders/pack-slip.tsx with printable pack slip / load summary
